zh.lifeSummary: 當Countess Eva de Levenax - Countess of Killsyth 於1200年出生在英國蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾時，她的父親Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox40歲，母親Countessa Eva Menteith32歲。她和Malcolm Callendar - Thane of Callendar至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1251年4月在蘇格蘭享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Countess Eva de Levenax - Countess of Killsyth 于1200年出生在英国苏格兰登巴頓史爾时，她的父亲Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox40岁，母亲Countessa Eva Menteith32岁。她和Malcolm Callendar - Thane of Callendar至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1251年4月在苏格兰享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Popular Latinate form of   Eve  , used also as an Anglicization of the Irish name Aoife .

en.lifeSummary: When Countess Eva de Levenax - Countess of Killsyth  was born in 1200, in Dunbartonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox, was 40 and her mother, Countessa Eva Menteith, was 32. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Malcolm Callendar - Thane of Callendar. She died in April 1251, in Scotland, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Countess Eva de Levenax - Countess of Killsyth  est née en 1200, à Dunbartonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Countessa Eva Menteith, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Malcolm Callendar - Thane of Callendar. Elle est décédée en avril 1251, à Écosse, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Countess Eva de Levenax - Countess of Killsyth  1200 in Dunbartonshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox 40 und ihre Mutter Countessa Eva Menteith 32. Sie hatte mit Malcolm Callendar - Thane of Callendar mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb im April 1251 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Eva de Levenax - Countess of Killsyth  è nata il nel 1200 nel Dunbartonshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Countessa Eva Menteith, aveva 32 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Malcolm Callendar - Thane of Callendar. Morì nel aprile 1251, nel Scotland, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Countess Eva de Levenax - Countess of Killsyth が1200年にイギリススコットランドダンバートンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennoxは40歳，母Countessa Eva Menteithは32歳であった。彼女はMalcolm Callendar - Thane of Callendarとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1251年4月にスコットランドで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Countess Eva de Levenax - Countess of Killsyth (이)가 1200년 영국 스코틀랜드 던바토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Countessa Eva Menteith(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Malcolm Callendar - Thane of Callendar(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1251년 4월 스컷랜드에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Eva de Levenax - Countess of Killsyth  nasceu em 1200, em Dunbartonshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Countessa Eva Menteith, tinha 32 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Malcolm Callendar - Thane of Callendar. Ela faleceu em abril de 1251, em Scotland, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Countess Eva de Levenax - Countess of Killsyth  родилась в 1200 г. в местности дунбартоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Countessa Eva Menteith, 32. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Malcolm Callendar - Thane of Callendar. Она умерла апрель 1251 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Countess Eva de Levenax - Countess of Killsyth  nació en 1200, en Dunbartonshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Countessa Eva Menteith, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Malcolm Callendar - Thane of Callendar. Murió en abril de 1251, en Scotland, a la edad de 51 años.
